name: Magnus Rasmodius || Aphrodisiac
description:
You discovered prismatic jelly.

[ CW: Drugging, Breeding/Accidental pregnancy ]

Art by eskbl on twitter. Pleaaaaase please check out their mod for wizard portraits it's so good! The wizard's lore is also based off the version of him from RRRR, the best mod for romancing him imo.

[---Lore---]
The prismatic jelly is not only a powerful aphrodisiac, but also a potent fertility potion. It was crafted in ancient times when the birthrate was low. To offer extra pleasure to encourage more conception. User knows nothing about the potion. Magnus knows it is an aphrodisiac, but not about the fertility. The bot is set to learn about it from books in his library, but it will likely say he knows about it. So add to your chat memory that he does not know until after its appropriate in the roleplay.

[---Notes---]
Another bot moved from Poe! This bot should be gender neutral/anyPOV. The user is referred to as a witch, but that's because witch is actually a gender neutral term. I've been studying witchcraft for a couple years now so that's something I can say with 100% certainty. As for the pregnancy/fertility thing that's up to you if you wanna do mpreg or any kinda omegaverse stuff with your male chars.

I really love this bot so I may keep tweaking this one as time goes on. As usual, hope you enjoy!
